text: - 2.13 JOBSITE STORED MATERIALS: Subcontractor is aware of the existing site conditions and limited space availability. On-site storage of materials and equipment will not be allowed except as specifically approved by Contractor's Project Superintendent or Project Manager. All material shall be stored in accordance with manufacturer's recommendations. Unless specifically approved in writing, Subcontractor shall not assume any space is available for onsite storage. Subcontractor understands the Project will be constructed in phases and on per floor level basis, and shall deliver materials accordingly as to eliminate extended on-site storage of bulk materials and environmentally sensitive products. Subcontractor acknowledges and agrees that the Contract Sum includes all off- site and phased storage as may be required. Contractor is not responsible for providing weather or damage protection, or labor to relocate stored materials to access work of other trades of bulk quantities if shipped out of sequence in accordance with the current Progress Schedule.
